HeroDiv.content: Synapse combines courses, live classes, chat, and assignments into a single, production-grade learning platform.

LandingPageAboutDiv.title: Everything you need to learn effectively
LandingPageAboutDiv.content: A complete learning ecosystem designed for engagement, collaboration and real results
LandingPageAboutDiv.liveClassesContent: Join interactive sessions with real-time video, screen sharing, and collaborative tools.
LandingPageAboutDiv.structuredCoursesContent: Progress through curated modules with video lessons, documents, and quizzes.
LandingPageAboutDiv.realTimeChatContent: Collaborate with peers and instructors in course-specific channels.
LandingPageAboutDiv.communityLearningContent: Connect with thousands of learners and industry-leading instructors.
LandingPageAboutDiv.smartProgressContent: Track your learning journey with intelligent analytics and milestones.
LandingPageAboutDiv.trustedPlatformContent: Enterprise-grade security with role-based access and data protection.

LandingAcceleratedLearning.title: Ready to accelerate your learning ?
LandingAcceleratedLearning.content: Join thousands of learners already using Synapse. Start free, upgrade when you're ready

landingPricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
landingPricing.content: Start free. Upgrade as you grow.
